name: Fagioli e Gabmeri (Canellini Beans with Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dried White Beans (such as cannellini, Great Northern or navy beans)
6 large Fresh Sage Leaves (or 1 t Dried Whole Leaf Sage)
2 large Garlic Cloves, peeled and chopped
Salt and Black Pepper to taste
1 Tomato, core, peel, and chop finely
1 lb Medium Shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in a non-aluminum container covered with at least 5 inches of cold water.
2. Drain the beans well and place them with all other ingredients (except salt) in a large pot that can hold everything comfortably.
3. Add enough cold water to cover the ingredients by about 3 inches.
4. Cook gently over low heat for about 1 hour or more, until the liquid is mostly absorbed and the beans are moist and succulent. Do not let them dry out.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Serve hot, drizzled with olive oil. They are also delicious at room temperature or slightly chilled.
7. Sauté the shrimp in olive oil with a pinch of salt and black pepper for about 2 minutes, stirring often. Avoid overcooking.
8. Serve the sautéed shrimp alongside the beans.
